series_metadata.series_description: Records include correspondence regarding reports of unusual incidents occurring on ODJFS premises throughout the state; e.g., thefts, fires, threats, injuries, disorderly conduct, etc. Correspondence may include Incident Reports(JFS33501),Police/Fire Reports, witness statements, etc, as applicable. (Most documents are originals; some are copies).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 5 years then erase., Electronic: Erase
